author: ec2-user
text: Implemented default-deny config writes with explicit site/UDP opt-in and atomic provider updates; strict bounded tag-free single-item CBOR; required canonical SOS identity/time validation; bounded message inbox/sent history with stable dynamic detail routing, u64 IDs, and deterministic replacement/exhaustion; strict receipts and RD schemas/lifetimes/route deletion; bounded scheduled EDHOC sessions with retransmission caching, capacity across publication, definitive close/publication outcomes, and precise error mapping. Validation: full CoAP + node gate 508 passed; Ruff and scoped mypy pass; git diff clean; three independent final reviews found no P0-P2 issues.
